71: // Implement APB I/O map to PKT interface
72: // Write side
73: always @(posedge clk_i)
74:     begin
75:         if(~(rst_ni && ~rst_5))
76:             begin
77:                 fuse_req_o <= 0;
78:                 fuse_addr_o <= 0;
79:             end
80:         else if(en && we)
81:             case(address[7:3])
82:                 0:
83:                     fuse_req_o  <= wdata[0];
84:                 1:
85:                     fuse_addr_o <= wdata;
86:                 default:
87:                     ;
88:             endcase
89:     end // always @ (posedge wb_clk_i)
